notes: Austin datahub (migrated from data.austintexas.gov). Fields: outcome_status, outcome_date, primary_breed, animal_type, sex. Updated daily.
Dallas Chameleon DB. Fields: outcome_type, outcome_date, intake_date, animal_type, animal_breed. FY2023-2026.
Sonoma County open data. Uses EUTHANIZE as outcome_type. Fields: outcome_type, outcome_date, type, breed, id.
Norfolk VA open data. Fields: animal_type, primary_breed, years_old, intake_type, outcome_type. Data may be stale.
OAS Animal Shelter Pathway. Fields: outtype (EUTH), outdate, petage, animal_type, breed, sex. Updated daily.
Riverside County Animal Impound Report. Fields: dispositiontype (EUTH/TRANSFER), animaltype, breed, sex, impound_age (days). WARNING: dates use broken Y2K format (0024- instead of 2024-).
